_comment: T1 on_status carrying a deviation. The deviation.reasonCode reuses the SHARED ServiceCoordination DeviationReasonCode class (no redefinition in HealthReferral) and OVERRIDES @context from the scoord default to the HealthReferral vocabulary — demonstrating the federated, network-specific coded value. @type stays fixed ('DeviationReasonCode'); only @context and code vary. The health code PATIENT_CANCELLED maps to scoord:SUBJECT_CANCELLED via skos:exactMatch (vocab.jsonld).

deviation.note: Patient contacted the coordinator to cancel — transport unavailable.
